plays.summary: Both lineups grade below average — DET at 92 wRC+ and ARI at 76. Weak bats on both sides suppress the total. Starters are evenly matched (Justin Verlander 4.16 / Michael Soroka 4.02 xFIP). 87°F heat adds to the over lean pulls the other way, but not enough to flip the lean. Model has 7.4, market is at 9.0 — under by -1.6 runs.

TBR (104 wRC+) and MIL (117 wRC+) — both lineups grade as above-average run producers. Starters are evenly matched (Nick Martinez 3.94 / Kyle Harrison 4.34 xFIP), and MIL's pen is taxed (13 innings last 2 days). Model has 10.0, market is at 8.0 — over by +2.0 runs.
